summary: Completed testing of Iteration 13 features: Price synchronization between frontend and backend, checkout session creation for all plan types, and PaymentSuccess page. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Checkout URL is a valid Stripe URL
GET /api/checkout/status/{session_id} returns error for invalid session
All individual plan prices match expected values
All family plan prices match expected values
Frontend: Pricing page displays all prices correctly
Frontend: All subscribe buttons present (weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly, family-*)
Frontend: PaymentSuccess shows error when no session_id provided
Frontend: PaymentSuccess shows 'Verificando tu pago...' with valid session_id
Frontend: Subscribe button redirects to Stripe checkout with correct price
critical_code_review_comments: SUBSCRIPTION_PACKAGES in server.py (line 211) correctly synchronized with frontend Pricing.js
/api/plans endpoint (line 1842) returns all plan types with correct prices
/api/create-checkout-session (line 2036) accepts all plan types and redirects to /payment-success
PaymentSuccess.js correctly handles: no session_id (error), verifying state, success state, and failed state
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use API endpoints directly

mocked_apis.banking_service: Banking integration is MOCKED - does not connect to real banks
mocked_apis.stripe: Stripe is in LIVE mode but test sessions created for verification

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 features fully tested. Prices synchronized: weekly €9.99, monthly €29.99, quarterly €74.99, yearly €249.99, family-monthly €49.99, family-quarterly €129.99, family-yearly €399.99. PaymentSuccess page at /payment-success handles all states (verifying, success, error). Checkout flow redirects to Stripe and back to /payment-success.
